name: J2EE Misconfiguration: Data Transmission Without Encryption
description: A J2EE application is configured to transmit data without encryption, allowing attackers to intercept and read or modify sensitive information in transit over the network.
detection_pattern: EGRESS[network] or EXTERNAL[http] node transmits sensitive data from a J2EE/web application context without an EXTERNAL[tls/ssl] wrapper, or configuration lacks transport-guarantee CONFIDENTIAL in web.xml security constraints
